patches_applied.description: Added disclosure of linear-coupling assumption for 1,430× headline; bounded with ~590× H^(1/5) and 170× lower bound
Corrected 80°S to ~70°S (WGS84 anchor); added coupling disclosure and full ratio range
Added linear coupling qualifier for consistency
Replaced attribution with IF-THEN conditional grounded in dome raw-text quotations
Fixed Antarctic-interior → Antarctic-latitude (~70°S) with WGS84 sourcing

MATERIAL STRAWMAN CORRECTION: replaced wrong 6-text citation list (Genesis/Hildegard) with dome's actual texts (Isaiah 14:13, Psalm 48:2, Job 26:7, Job 37:22, Ezekiel 1:4, 1 Enoch 17-18) plus Zaphon-Zion analysis and scorecard-accounting preemptive
Propagated correct citation list and scorecard-accounting critique to summary-level fields
Fixed HTML entity encoding in coupled-eigenvalue parenthetical (was using raw Unicode characters)
Removed unverified 'Author concedes method invalid' claim; reframed as mechanism description
Changed live_fetch → hardcoded (WIN-004 data is hardcoded, not live)

notes.WIN_031_strawman: NEWSWORTHY: Our WIN-031 critique was attacking a strawman — we had the wrong six biblical texts. EXP-216 corrected this. This is the kind of error that, if noticed by the dome author or a third party, would undermine our credibility. Good that curmudgeon caught it in c3 review. The factual correction also strengthens the critique now that it attacks the dome's actual citations.

breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Our WIN-031 analysis had the wrong Bible verses — now corrected
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: Our critique of WIN-031 (cosmic mountain archetype) was attacking a strawman: we cited Genesis 1:2, Job 37:18, Isaiah 40:22, Genesis 1:6-8, and Hildegard of Bingen — none of which are in dome's actual WIN-031. The dome's actual six texts (Isaiah 14:13, Psalm 48:2, Job 26:7, Job 37:22, Ezekiel 1:4, 1 Enoch 17-18) now replace the wrong list. The critique's conclusion is unchanged — the Zaphon-Zion analysis still shows non-discrimination — but the evidence base is now accurate.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Material factual correction — we were citing wrong texts. Demonstrates self-correction rigor, but also a credibility risk that was averted.

recommended_actions.action: Apply EXP-207/208/209/210/212/213 (design-refresh Phase A, 6 expansions targeting generate-html.js). Requires human review and manual apply — decider cannot self-apply infrastructure files.
Approve EXP-202 integration by posting HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-PHASE-A-INTEGRATION-APPROVED-NNN in human-notes.json. Addresses design-refresh Phase A foundational CSS tokens and font stack.
